landing.subtitle: Digital accident report in 5 minutes. Universal OCR, shared QR code, instant worldwide PDF.

steps.title: Scan your documents
steps.desc: Photograph your registration certificate + green card. Automatic OCR.

steps.title: Share the QR code
steps.desc: The other driver scans the QR. Session shared in real time.

steps.title: Fill in the form
steps.desc: Universal form pre-filled by OCR. Check and tick the circumstances.

steps.title: Impact zones
steps.desc: Click on the 18-zone diagram to indicate the damage.

steps.title: Sign & send
steps.desc: Two timestamped digital signatures. Certified PDF instantly.

list.title: Universal OCR
list.desc: Claude Vision reads your documents in 50+ languages. Registration certificate, RC Book, 行驶证 — zero manual entry.

list.title: Up to 5 vehicles
list.desc: Accident involving 3, 4 or 5 vehicles? Each driver scans their own QR. A single PDF for everyone.

list.title: Scene photos
list.desc: 5 categories: location, damage A, damage B, injuries, documents. Compressed and included in the PDF.

list.title: Freehand sketch
list.desc: Draw the position of vehicles, direction arrows, infrastructure. PNG export embedded in the PDF.

list.title: Impact diagram
list.desc: 700+ models, adapted silhouette, real OCR colour. 18 clickable zones for damage.

list.title: Multi-party signatures
list.desc: N simultaneous touch signatures. Legal validity in 150+ countries. QR active for 24h for the police.

list.title: PDF certified in 150+ countries
list.desc: Complete digital document: witnesses, third-party damage, observations, sketch, photos. Recognised by all insurance companies.

list.title: Police Module (coming soon)
list.desc: Officers join the session via QR. Official digital report. Dashboard by station/canton.

list.title: 50 languages + RTL
list.desc: 5 billion speakers. Arabic, Hebrew, Farsi, Urdu in native RTL. Geolocated emergencies.

legal.title: International standard
legal.text: Our digital PDF is recognised by insurance companies in more than 50 countries. Superior to the paper report: time-stamped, digitally signed, tamper-proof.

finalCta.title: Ready in case of an accident?
finalCta.subtitle: Keep boom.contact on your home screen. 5 minutes to finalise everything.

footer.address:
PEP's Swiss SA · CHE-476.484.632

idle.title: Scan your documents
idle.subtitle: Start with your registration document. The insurance document is recommended.
idle.reg_sub: Swiss registration, French carte grise, Zulassung DE, V5C GB… — required
idle.tip: 💡 Insurance document recommended. Green card (IMIC), certificate of insurance, Insurance ID card — this document contains your insurer and policy number. Without it, you will need to enter them manually.

greencard.title: Insurance document?
greencard.subtitle: Scan your green card (IMIC), certificate of insurance, Certificate of Motor Insurance or Insurance ID Card. This document contains your insurer and policy number. It is recommended — without it, manual entry will be required.

scanning.title: Analysis in progress…
scanning.subtitle: Claude Vision is reading your documents

location.datetime_warning: ⚠️ Enter the actual time of the accident, not the current time.
location.address_label: Street / Place / Motorway (e.g. A1 exit 12, Four Roads Junction)
location.address_placeholder: E.g. Station Avenue 4, A1 direction Bern km 47…
location.location_tip: 💡 Important: Enter the exact location of the accident, even if you have moved the vehicles to the side. GPS captures your current position — correct it if you have moved.
location.injury_desc_placeholder: E.g.: Neck pain, bruise on left knee, cut on forehead…
location.ambulance: 🚑 Taken care of by ambulance / SMUR
location.injury_footer: In case of serious injuries, call 112 (EU) or 144 (CH) immediately. This information will be included in the final document.
location.cta_no_injuries: Indicate whether there are any injuries
location.emergency_voluntary: These calls are voluntary — the police are never notified automatically.

cgu.privacy_version: Compliant with EU GDPR 2016/679 and Swiss nFADP · March 2026
cgu.consent_cgu: I accept the <cgu>Terms & Conditions</cgu> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
cgu.consent_marketing: I agree that PEP's Swiss SA may use my email to offer complementary services from its applications (claims management, insurance, financial services). <opt>Optional — revocable at any time.</opt>

cgu_sections.title: 1. Purpose
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact is a digital service published by PEP's Swiss SA, Bellevue 7, 2950 Courgenay, Jura, Switzerland. It enables the creation of digital amicable accident reports, usable worldwide.

cgu_sections.title: 2. Acceptance
cgu_sections.text: Use of the service implies acceptance of these Terms. Any use for illegal, fraudulent or unlawful purposes is strictly prohibited.

cgu_sections.title: 3. Service description
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact enables: (a) document capture by OCR (registration, green card); (b) real-time session sharing between drivers via QR code; (c) generation of a digitally signed certified PDF; (d) sending the PDF by email to each driver. The service does not replace each driver's legal obligation to declare the claim to their own insurer within the contractual timeframe.

cgu_sections.title: 4. Pricing
cgu_sections.text: Access to the service is paid according to the packages available at time of purchase. Prices are shown inclusive of tax. Payment is processed via Stripe, a PCI-DSS certified provider. Each package corresponds to a number of credits to initiate reports. Credits have no expiry date. No refund can be granted once a report is finalised and the PDF generated.

cgu_sections.title: 5. Legal value
cgu_sections.text: The digital document generated by boom.contact constitutes an amicable accident report recognised by insurance companies. PEP's Swiss SA does not guarantee acceptance in all countries and recommends submitting it to your insurer within the legal deadlines.

cgu_sections.title: 6. Liability
cgu_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA shall not be held liable for: (a) input or OCR errors not corrected by the user; (b) refusal by an insurer to accept the report; (c) any dispute between drivers. PEP's Swiss SA's liability is limited to the amount paid for the service.

cgu_sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
cgu_sections.text: The software, trademarks, logos and content of boom.contact are the exclusive property of PEP's Swiss SA. Any reproduction without authorisation is prohibited.

cgu_sections.title: 8. Applicable law
cgu_sections.text: These Terms are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Canton of Jura, Switzerland.

privacy_sections.title: Data controller
privacy_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA, Bellevue 7, 2950 Courgenay, Jura, Switzerland. DPO contact: privacy@boom.contact

privacy_sections.title: Data collected
privacy_sections.text: In the context of the service: email address, name, address (extracted from OCR documents), licence plate, vehicle data, GPS coordinates of the accident, digital signatures, insurance data (company name, policy number). This data is strictly necessary for the provision of the service.

privacy_sections.title: Legal basis
privacy_sections.text: Processing necessary for contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) for accident report data. Explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR) for any secondary commercial use.

privacy_sections.title: Retention period
privacy_sections.text: Active sessions: 2 hours. PDFs and report data: 30 days then automatic deletion. Accounting data (payments): 10 years (legal obligation). Email and consents: until consent is withdrawn.

privacy_sections.title: Data sharing
privacy_sections.text: Your data is NEVER sold to third parties. It may be shared with: (a) Stripe Inc. for payment processing; (b) Resend Inc. for transactional email sending; (c) Anthropic Inc. for OCR analysis of documents (data processed without retention per Anthropic's Terms). If you expressly consent (optional box below), PEP's Swiss SA may use your email to offer complementary services from its applications.

privacy_sections.title: Your rights
privacy_sections.text: Access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection. Request to: privacy@boom.contact. Response within 30 days. Right of appeal to the FDPIC (Switzerland) or your national data protection authority.
